description: WSD schedule + EMA weights + label smoothing — stable LR avoids the early-peak degradation seen in failed 1B run
Fix critical EMA bug (decay=0.9995 over 200 steps = ~random weights eval), replace with best raw-model checkpoint tracking
Replace unstable Muon (LR=0.02 causing explosion, val_bpb=257>>15) with AdamW for all params; 300 steps cosine schedule; no label smoothing
Fix divergence (val_bpb=55>random=15) by removing GradScaler (bf16 doesn't need it); reintroduce Muon at conservative LR=0.005; WSD schedule; 200 steps
AdamW-only 500 steps, LR=1.5e-4, WD=0.01, clip=1.0, warmup=100, no GradScaler — fix divergence from exp_3
AdamW 1000 steps, LR=3e-4, WSD schedule, SWA last 20% — double tokens + proven LR from exp3 minus its bugs
